title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Navkar Corporation

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Navkar Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Join the Navkar Corporation family as a Logistics Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Navkar Corporation:
Navkar Corporation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navkar Corporation!
